name: UBA : First Access to Critical Assets
notes: Indicates that this is a first-time access to a critical asset for this user. The "Critical Systems Users Seen" reference collection governs the time-to-live of an observation. By default this rule will detect the first access in three months.
conditions_text: when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
when an event matches all of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success, BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when any of Destination IP are contained in any of Critical Assets - IP
when any of Destination IP is the key and any of Username is the value in any of Critical Systems Users Seen - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : First Access to Critical Assets on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success, BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when any of Destination IP are contained in any of Critical Assets - IP
AND NOT when any of Destination IP is the key and any of Username is the value in any of Critical Systems Users Seen - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : First Access to Critical Assets
Event description: senseValue=10,senseDesc='Indicates that this is the first time access for this user to a critical asset.',usecase_id='0e27f762-bdf6-4cc4-b542-4b59cd33020f'
Add the "userName" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "UBA : User Accounts, Privileged, Observed"
Add "userName" to Reference Map Of Sets: "Critical Systems Users Seen" with key "destinationIP"
